visual_description: A high-angle, wide shot captures a dimly lit interrogation room. Three men are seated around a large, dark table. On the far side of the table, a man in a white shirt and tie sits with a stern expression, looking down. Next to him, a man in a denim shirt looks down at his hands, appearing distressed. Across the table, a third man, seen from the back, gestures with his hands as if speaking. On the table are several briefcases, one open to reveal stacks of cash, and a notepad. The room is dark, with a cool, blueish light casting shadows across the wooden floor and the men. A watermark is visible in the top right corner. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The audio is quiet and somber, with no background music, creating a tense and serious atmosphere. A man speaks in a low, deliberate voice, his tone filled with a sense of weary resignation and gravity. He begins, "爸爸常说" (Dad used to say), before pausing.
